name: EquaLife Capital
description: A venture debt investment fund providing working capital, asset financing, and bridge financing to start-ups, growth stage companies, and SMEs in East Africa.

About
EquaLife Capital is a venture debt investment fund providing working capital, asset financing, and bridge financing to start-ups and SMEs operating in East Africa. Investment is made alongside reputable equity investors. On-going strategic, operational, and financial support is provided to each investee to add tangible value to the growth and profitability of each company.
